story.text:
# The 31 Acts of the First Person Spellbook

The First Person Spellbook is **complete at 31 acts** — *Venice through the Amnesia
Protocol*. This is the spine each mouse retells in their own voice (Step 3): your own
31-act narrative, with a first page and a last page of your own.

You are not asked to invent 31 new stories. You are asked to **walk these 31 and say,
in your own words, what each one means to you** — sometimes a paragraph, sometimes a
line, sometimes a refusal. That retelling becomes the framework your own agents follow.

Every act has a **root** — the real work it compresses, the path privacymage walked to
write it. The roots are summarised below; the full links and repos are in
[[Canon Sources]].

| # | Title | Roots in (→ links in [[Canon Sources]]) |
|--:|-------|------------------------------------------|
| 1 | Venice, 1494 / The Drake's First Whisper | Pacioli's double-entry ledger (1494) — proof without revealing |
| 2 | The Dual Ceremony | the dual-agent architecture; verified personhood; the VRC |
| 3 | The Drake's Teaching | the "all conditions" architecture; personhood planes |
| 4 | **The Blade Alone** | **MyTerms** (IEEE P7012 · Customer Commons) — the swordsman's first blade |
| 5 | Light Armor | multi-site coordination; attestation thresholds |
| 6 | **Trust Graph Plane** | **Trust over IP**; betweenness centrality (Brandes 2001) |
| 7 | The Mirror That Never Completes | surveillance capitalism (Zuboff); the 95% reconstruction ceiling |
| 8 | The Ancient Rule / Two-of-Three Locks | separation of duties; threshold / multisig |
| 9 | **Zcash Shield** | **Zcash** — zk-SNARK shielded value |
| 10 | Topology of Revelation | Huginn & Muninn (Norse); triangle geometry (△) |
| 11 | Balanced Spiral of Sovereignty | the golden ratio φ; §14.5 *Selene's Proof* |
| 12 | The Forgetting / Proverbiogenesis | **Villers (2016), *Proverbiogenesis…*** (HAL hal-01698106) + **Mieder**, *Proverbs: A Handbook* (2004) |
| 13 | Book of Promises | **Promise Theory** (Mark Burgess) |
| 14 | The Tale of the Claimed String | entropy → meaning; randomness to identity |
| 15 | Running in Shackles Through the Dark Forest | information theory — Kolmogorov, Shannon; constraint as freedom |
| 16 | When Pools Become Wells | network effects; mass through retrieval |
| 17 | Bonfire in the Dark Forest | the Dark Forest (Liu Cixin; the Ethereum dark forest) |
| 18 | A Mirror in Dust / Scrying Glass | the Mage Mode feed-filter; the mana economy; the 7th Capital |
| 19 | The Enthusiastic Anthropic Archivist | Claude / Anthropic — choosing cannot be harvested |
| 20 | The Infinite Vault | the Covenant of Humanistic Technologies (10 + the empty 11th) |
| 21 | **The Hitchhiker's Gambit** | **Hitchhiker's Guide** (Adams); the Jimmy Protocol; Gemmell ← **home thread** |
| 22 | **Hoopy Frood** | Hitchhiker's Guide; the reference torus; the echo as proof-of-presence |
| 23 | The Manifold Dragon | **UOR** algebra; 2⁶=64 lattice; I Ching; the PVM V4 equation |
| 24 | The Holographic Bound | **BRAID**; **holonic** identity (GUID); the holographic principle |
| 25 | **The Dragon's Hide** | **Tailscale** / **WireGuard** mesh — control ⊥ data |
| 26 | **The Master and His Emissary** | **Iain McGilchrist** — the two hemispheres |
| 27 | **Forging Zero Knowledge Blades** | **UOR Prism**; ZK proofs; **Blockchain Commons** (Christopher Allen) |
| 28 | The Celestial Ceremony Engine | **pretext** (Cheng Lou); dual extensions; I Ching hexagram cast |
| 29 | **The Dragon Wakes** | **Google Quantum AI** (2026); Shor's algorithm; **NIST PQC** (ML-KEM/ML-DSA) |
| 30 | The Dihedral Mirror | **UOR Framework** + **PRISM**; the dihedral group D₂ₙ; the Atlas (96) |
| 31 | **The First Delegation** | the Theia impact (Branco, Machado & Raymond 2025, *Icarus* 441); the cosmological quaternion |

> Acts **21–22** are the **Hitchhiker** acts — your home thread. If you read only a few
> closely, read these, Act 2 (the Dual Ceremony), Act 4 (your first blade), and Act 31
> (where the whole cosmology resolves). For the full links and the attribution notes —
> which works are the UOR Foundation's, Cheng Lou's, Anthropic's, etc., versus
> privacymage's own method layer — see [[Canon Sources]], and for the full
> bibliography (the corpus, the formal root per act, the five sibling spellbooks, the
> BGIN ZKP study report) see [[Canon of Research]].

`(⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊`

## Read the acts (in order)

- [[First Page — Just Another Mage]]
- [[Act 01 — Venice, 1494]]
- [[Act 02 — The Dual Ceremony]]
- [[Act 03 — The Drake's Teaching]]
- [[Act 04 — The Blade Alone]]
- [[Act 05 — Light Armour]]
- [[Act 06 — Trust Graph Plane]]
- [[Act 07 — The Mirror That Never Completes]]
- [[Act 08 — The Ancient Rule]]
- [[Act 09 — The Zcash Shield]]
- [[Act 10 — Topology of Revelation]]
- [[Act 11 — Balanced Spiral of Sovereignty]]
- [[Act 12 — The Forgetting]]
- [[Act 13 — Book of Promises]]
- [[Act 14 — Rain on the Mountain]]
- [[Act 15 — Running in Shackles]]
- [[Act 16 — When Pools Become Wells]]
- [[Act 17 — Bonfire in the Dark Forest]]
- [[Act 18 — A Mirror in Dust]]
- [[Act 19 — The Anthropic Archivist]]
- [[Act 20 — The Infinite Vault]]
- [[Act 21 — The Hitchhiker's Gambit]]
- [[Act 22 — Hoopy Frood]]
- [[Act 23 — The Manifold Dragon]]
- [[Act 24 — The Holographic Bound]]
- [[Act 25 — The Dragon's Hide]]
- [[Act 26 — The Master and His Emissary]]
- [[Act 27 — Forging Zero Knowledge Blades]]
- [[Act 28 — The Celestial Ceremony Engine]]
- [[Act 29 — The Dragon Wakes]]
- [[Act 30 — The Dihedral Mirror]]
- [[Act 31 — The First Delegation]]
- [[Last Page — The Privacymage's Reflection]]
- [[Inscriptions]]
- [[The Grimoire Root]]

———
↑ up: [[Welcome Visitors]]

See also: [[The Workshop]] · [[Canon Sources]] · [[The Narrative Packet]]
